name: codomain declared
closeout_form: Every sector has a declared scheme/codomain before comparison; top and light quarks show why this matters.

name: transport map supplied
closeout_form: Every promotion above trace/source requires a typed map; missing U_chilat blocks light-quark export.

name: constants ledger
closeout_form: External constants and conventions are separated from APF trace anchors; CODATA/PDG/CMS ledgers are recorded as external.

name: covariance protocol
closeout_form: Residuals are interpreted only through declared comparison envelopes or covariance ledgers.

name: no-smuggling audit
closeout_form: Target reuse and target-fitted scales/operators are forbidden and quarantined as diagnostics only.

name: residual channels assigned
closeout_form: Nonzero residuals remain visible and are assigned to route/codomain/covariance/external-ledger channels.
